audits.cleanReason: Reviewed the chapter's only true negation pivots; both survive because one states a hard time constraint and the other preserves plot-critical spatial precision.

findings.subject: camp
findings.realAgent: Jaina's group walked away from the camp.
findings.reason: The scene hands motion to the camp instead of naming the people leaving it.

findings.text: Then the wind got under her hood, and the bay and the ship came back hard.
findings.subject: bay and ship
findings.realAgent: Jaina's attention snapped back to the bay and the ship.
findings.reason: The line gives returning force to scenery instead of to Jaina's own thought.
findings.suggestedFix: Then the wind got under her hood, and she thought of the bay and the ship again.

findings.text: Jaina rode two lengths ahead of the rear guard and one behind Sylvanas because nobody had discussed the spacing and the spacing had arrived anyway.
findings.subject: spacing
findings.realAgent: The formation had settled into that arrangement through habit.
findings.reason: The sentence turns an abstract arrangement into the mover instead of naming the group's settled formation.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina rode two lengths ahead of the rear guard and one behind Sylvanas because nobody had discussed it and the formation had settled that way anyway.

audits.cleanReason: No tic exceeded its chapter cap. The closest counts stayed within limit: tightened 2/3, eye-gaze beats 4/4 with scene-specific utility, and non-said performance tags 2/3.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found only three mild intent-smear issues and no moderate/severe failures; all three have conservative cross-checked fixes.
